raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu eſſi winnu Sirdi
peetizzigu atraddis preeſſch ta-
wu Waign/ un eſſi ar winnu
weenu Derribu darrijs/ winnam
docht to Semmi to Kananiteru /
Getiteru/ Amoriteru/ un Were-
fiteru/ un Jebusiteru/ un Girgo-
siteru/ winna Dſimmumam to
docht/ un tu eſſi tawn Wahrdu
ſtipri turrejs; Tapehz ka tu
taisns eſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu eſſi eerandſijis muh-
fu Tehwu Behdas Eqiptes-
Semmē; Un winnu Brehk-
ſchanu klaufijs pee tahs Needru-
Juhras.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eſſi Sihmes un Brih-
nimus darrijs pee Waraifs/ un
pee wiſſeem winna Kalpeent/ un
pee wiſſeem winna Semmes
Landun. Jo tu finnaji/ ka tee
lepnigi pretti teem turrejahs; Un
tu eſſi tew weenu Wahrdw dar-
rijs/ itt ka tas ſchodeen irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu eſſi to Juhrw win-
nu Preeſſcha dallijs/ ka tee Juhr-
ras Widou Saufinnā irr pahr-
gahufchi; Un winnu Pakkat-
dſinnejus eſſi tu Dſikkumōs ee-
mettis/ itt ka Akmini ſtiprōs
Uhdenis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Deend eſſi tu tohs pa-
waddijs zaur Badebbes Stab-
bu/ un Rafti zaur Ugguns-
Stabbu / gaischu darridams
winneem to Zelta/ pahr kurra
teem bija ja-eet,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu eſſi nolaidees u
to Kalnu Sinai/ un ar teem
Debbes runnajs/ un teem de-
pareiſas Teesas / peetizzig-
Banſlibas/ Liffumnis / un l-
bus Banſlus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu eſſi teem ta-
ſwehtu Swehdeennu ſinnam d-
rijs/ un eſſi teem Bauſlus/
Eestahdijums/ un weenu Ba-
libu pawehſlejis zaur Mohsu
wu Kalpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir Maisi eſſi tu teem
Debbes dewis/ kad tee bij iſ-
kuscht/ un Uhdeni teem no ta-
miza-Kalna iſweddis / kad
bija iſflahpuſchi : Un eſſi us tee-
fazzijs: Teem bij ee-eet / un
mantoht to Semmi/ pahr ko
tawu Rohku pazehli/ winnee
to doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee/ un mubfu Te-
wi irr lepnigi turrejschees/ un
pahrgalwigi tappuſchi / un t-
weem Banſleem ne klaufiſchi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee irr aisleegute-
klantiht/ un ne irr atminnejs-
tawus Brihnumus/ fo tu p-
teem eſſi darrijs / bet tee tap-
pahrgalwigi / un eezeble wee-
Wirfneeku/ ka tee nhs fawu Ka-
pochanu atgreestobs eekſch f-
was Pahrgalwibas. Bet t-
wiffs Apschehtochanas Deeiv-
schehligs un Sirdſchehligs-
lehuprahtigs un no leeſas Sche-
laſtibas/ ne eſſi tohs atſahjis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jepſchu tee arridsan we-
nu iſleetu Teltnu darrija/ un fa-
zija: Schis irr taws Deeiv-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
